# Curator Receipt

## Decision

This source is kept because it reports a concrete benchmark result and supporting technical approach.

## Why

The source gives a specific measured outcome, a 65.4% success rate on SWE-bench Verified, and presents the piece as a technical breakdown of how that result was achieved. That is sufficient empirical substance for institute admission under benchmark-oriented material, even though it is vendor-authored.

## Limits
